user.title: Connect to Tuya IR Climate
user.description: Configure the Tuya Cloud project and the physical IR hub. The next step will discover the remotes attached to this hub.

remote.title: Configure the AC remote
remote.description: Select the virtual AC remote and confirm the Tuya values observed during reverse engineering.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the Tuya IR remote.
error.no_remotes: No remotes were found on this IR hub.

abort.already_configured: This Tuya IR remote is already configured.
